subject: Re: Kim Jong Un's visit to China
body: I am curious to see what will be a reaction from Trump's administration and from Europe if Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi do visit Kremlin and possibly Kim's visit right after... Reunion of three socialist countries?
body_html: I am curious to see what will be a reaction from Trump's administration and from Europe if Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi do visit Kremlin and possibly Kim's visit right after... Reunion of three socialist countries?

subject: Re: Kim Jong Un's visit to China
body:
Have you seen the full video? so interesting...
See the beginning. Looks like a theater, they emote too much. It's funny!☺
And also on 5:45 min when he meets XI Jinping before their diplomatic discussion meeting

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KQplQp0Gw7Y&utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_axioschina&stream=top-stories
